name: 86'd
short_description: Order Up, Chef! Grow a ragtag goblin kitchen crew and cook disgusting dishes for detestable diners, where mistakes don't just cost time, they cost a goblin's life! Can you keep your crew from getting 86'd?
detailed_description:
Order Up, Chef!

Grow a ragtag goblin kitchen crew and cook your way through this zany cooking sim, where mistakes don't just cost time, they cost a goblin's life!

Can you keep your crew from getting 86'd?

Game Features

Play through a story with all of the feelings.  It's got laughs, tears, a bit of betrayal.  It's a real Shakespearian Production... If Shakespeare were a Goblin....

Cook disgusting dishes for 4 differently detestable diners, each with their own special requests and special effects in the kitchen

Replay your favourite levels in Challenge Mode, and see how long you can last!

Keep your kitchen crew from getting 86'd by serving the right dish while keeping track of your dishes to keep them from burning as the pressure builds in the kitchen.  Or you can just give up and serve yourself instead.  Like, as the dinner, not as the diner.  You don't get to eat.  You're the Chef after all.  Service must come first.

reviews.review_text:
Chef didn't raise no punk! It's a short game with a few crunchy areas, but I did find myself getting weirdly into the flow of trying to multitask as many dishes as possible! 

While I did like the swapping goblins thing, I found myself really wishing I could throw plates and ingredients at my other chefs. 

Overall, I dig it!

Side note: I was able to run it on steam deck using proton experimental and it was pretty comfortable, but text is a tad small though
